clone_risk: NONE — all Layer 0 patterns explicitly redesigned

transformation_decisions.layer0_pattern: IOutboundMessageSender (sms-service internal interface, registered Startup.cs:751). Implementation: SmsConversationOutboundMessageSender.cs:23 calls IBroadcastSender.SendFastMessageSingleGroupAsync.
transformation_decisions.layer0_problem: IOutboundMessageSender and IBroadcastSender are sms-service internal. Green-ai cannot reference these types.
transformation_decisions.greenai_design: ISmsGatewayClient — new green-ai HTTP interface. Method: Task<SmsGatewayResult> SendMessageAsync(SendSmsRequest request). Registered as scoped HTTP client.

types.SendSmsRequest: Features/ConversationDispatch/Gateway/SendSmsRequest.cs — fields: ProfileId (int), SenderPhoneCode (int), SenderPhoneNumber (long), SenderGatewayProvider (GatewayProvider), RecipientPhoneCode (int), RecipientPhoneNumber (long), RecipientName (string), Text (string)

transformation_decisions.layer0_pattern: No background job in Layer 0. ConversationService.CreateAndSendConversationMessage:59 called inline by controller immediately after message creation (send-first).
transformation_decisions.layer0_problem: Send-first = partial state risk. No Queued concept. No async dispatch capability.
transformation_decisions.greenai_design: DispatchConversationMessagesJob : BackgroundService. Polls ConversationMessages WHERE Status=Queued ORDER BY Id ASC SELECT TOP(@BatchSize). Processes each message via DispatchConversationMessageHandler (IMediator.Send). No retry (v1 decision).
transformation_decisions.polling_query: SELECT TOP(@BatchSize) cm.Id, cm.ConversationId, cm.Text FROM ConversationMessages cm INNER JOIN Conversations c ON c.Id = cm.ConversationId WHERE cm.Status = @Queued ORDER BY cm.Id ASC
transformation_decisions.polling_note: No CustomerId filter at job level — job processes all tenants. Tenant isolation enforced per-message via GetConversation JOIN (DD_CD_03 preserved).

transformation_decisions.greenai_design: NONE (v1). Failed = terminal state. No re-queue. Dead letter not implemented in v1. Architect decision locked 2026-04-20.

transformation_decisions.item: Status lifecycle — INSERT-FIRST vs SEND-FIRST redesign
transformation_decisions.layer0_pattern: SEND-FIRST: ConversationService.cs:67-84 — IBroadcastSender called BEFORE INSERT. SmsLogId returned from send, then message inserted with SmsLogId already set. No Queued state.
transformation_decisions.layer0_problem: Partial state risk: if INSERT fails after send, SMS was sent but no DB record. No traceability.
transformation_decisions.greenai_design: INSERT-FIRST (inherited from conversation_messaging DONE 🔒): SendConversationReplyHandler.cs:88 inserts Status=Created, :96 updates to Status=Queued within transaction. Dispatch job reads Queued rows. On success: Status=Sent + SmsLogId set. On DLR: Sent→Delivered or Sent→Failed.

Sent.set_by: DispatchConversationMessageHandler — UPDATE SET SmsLogId=@SmsLogId, Status=Sent WHERE Id=@Id on ISmsGatewayClient success

Delivered.set_by: UpdateDeliveryStatusHandler — DLR SmsReceived1, batch UPDATE WHERE SmsLogId IN @SmsLogIds

Failed.set_by: DispatchConversationMessageHandler on ISmsGatewayClient failure OR UpdateDeliveryStatusHandler on error codes

transformation_decisions.item: DLR status remapping (Layer 0 enum → green-ai enum)
transformation_decisions.layer0_pattern: StatusUpdatesEventListener.cs:34-50. Layer 0 enum: Pending=0, Delivered=1, Failed=2.
transformation_decisions.greenai_design: UpdateDeliveryStatusHandler maps SmsStatusCode → green-ai ConversationMessageStatus. Transient codes (SmsSendNotReceived2, Unknown136, default) → no update (NOT Pending — no Pending in green-ai dispatch flow).
transformation_decisions.sql: UPDATE ConversationMessages SET Status=@Status WHERE SmsLogId IN @SmsLogIds — ConversationRepository.cs:84 pattern, status values remapped

transformation_decisions.layer0_pattern: NONE — Layer 0 has no Status=Queued polling concept.
transformation_decisions.greenai_design: New SQL derived from Layer 0 JOIN patterns. Embedded resource: GetQueuedConversationMessages.sql
transformation_decisions.sql: SELECT TOP(@BatchSize) cm.Id, cm.ConversationId, cm.Text FROM ConversationMessages cm INNER JOIN Conversations c ON c.Id = cm.ConversationId WHERE cm.Status = @Queued ORDER BY cm.Id ASC
transformation_decisions.derivation: JOIN pattern: ConversationRepository.cs:39 (GetConversationMessages JOIN). Status=Queued(1) from green-ai ConversationMessageStatus.cs. No CustomerId filter — tenant isolation per DD_CD_03 via GetConversation JOIN per message.

transformation_decisions.item: UPDATE ConversationMessage after dispatch — by Id (not SmsLogId)
transformation_decisions.layer0_pattern: ConversationRepository.cs:UpdateConversationMessageStatus:79 — UPDATE by SmsLogId. In Layer 0: SmsLogId is known before INSERT (send-first). SQL: if exists (...WHERE SmsLogId=@smsLogId) update SET Status=@status WHERE SmsLogId=@smsLogId
transformation_decisions.layer0_problem: In green-ai INSERT-FIRST: ConversationMessage.Id is known before dispatch. SmsLogId is null until dispatch returns — cannot update by SmsLogId.
transformation_decisions.greenai_design: New SQL: UPDATE ConversationMessages SET SmsLogId=@SmsLogId, Status=@Status WHERE Id=@Id AND Status=@Queued (optimistic guard: only update if still Queued — prevents race condition).
transformation_decisions.failure_sql: UPDATE ConversationMessages SET Status=@Failed WHERE Id=@Id AND Status=@Queued

layer0_flow: 4. INSERT ConversationMessage with SmsLogId already set (partial-state risk: DB insert after send)
5. No Queued state. No async dispatch. No DLR lifecycle in dispatch path.
greenai_flow: → INSERT-FIRST COMPLETE. Row guaranteed before any dispatch attempt.
→ SELECT TOP(N) WHERE Status=Queued ORDER BY Id ASC
4a. GetConversationMessage WHERE Id=@Id — verify Status=Queued (INV_CD_01 guard)
4b. GetConversation — phone numbers, CustomerId, GatewayProvider (JOIN CustomerId — DD_CD_03)
4d. SUCCESS: UPDATE SET SmsLogId=@SmsLogId, Status=Sent WHERE Id=@Id AND Status=@Queued
4e. FAILURE: UPDATE SET Status=Failed WHERE Id=@Id AND Status=@Queued
5a. Receive batch StatusUpdatesEvent (SmsLogId + StatusCode per item)
5c. Batch UPDATE SET Status=@Status WHERE SmsLogId IN @SmsLogIds

checks.reason: Not used. Replaced by ISmsGatewayClient — entirely new green-ai type with new contract.
Send-first pattern not replicated. DispatchConversationMessageHandler reads existing Queued row — no inline send after insert.

Same SmsStatusCode values used (Layer 0 enum is the authoritative source). Status values remapped to green-ai enum (Delivered=3, Failed=4). SQL pattern preserved (batch by SmsLogId — correct gateway correlation key). Logic restructured in UpdateDeliveryStatusHandler using green-ai patterns (Result<T>, vertical slice).

checks.item: ConversationRepository SQL patterns (GetConversationMessage:62, GetConversation:121, UpdateConversationMessageStatus:79, UpdateConversationMessageStatuses:84)
checks.reason: GetConversationMessage + GetConversation SQL reused (same data model). UPDATE after dispatch redesigned: by Id (not SmsLogId) + AND Status=@Queued guard. DLR UPDATE by SmsLogId preserved (correct key). New query: GetQueuedConversationMessages (no Layer 0 equivalent).

sql_files_greenai.name: GetQueuedConversationMessages.sql
sql_files_greenai.sql: SELECT TOP(@BatchSize) cm.Id, cm.ConversationId, cm.Text FROM ConversationMessages cm INNER JOIN Conversations c ON c.Id = cm.ConversationId WHERE cm.Status = @Queued ORDER BY cm.Id ASC

sql_files_greenai.name: GetConversationMessageById.sql
sql_files_greenai.sql: SELECT TOP(1) * FROM dbo.ConversationMessages WHERE Id = @Id

sql_files_greenai.name: GetConversationById.sql
sql_files_greenai.sql: SELECT c.*, cpn.PhoneCode SenderPhoneCode, cpn.PhoneNumber SenderPhoneNumber, cpn.GatewayProvider SenderGatewayProvider, cpn.CustomerId FROM Conversations c INNER JOIN ConversationPhoneNumbers cpn ON cpn.Id = c.ConversationPhoneNumberId WHERE c.Id = @Id

sql_files_greenai.name: UpdateConversationMessageDispatch.sql
sql_files_greenai.sql: UPDATE ConversationMessages SET SmsLogId = @SmsLogId, Status = @Status WHERE Id = @Id AND Status = @Queued
sql_files_greenai.source: REDESIGNED — Layer 0 updates by SmsLogId. Green-ai: update by Id (INSERT-FIRST) + optimistic guard AND Status=@Queued

sql_files_greenai.name: UpdateConversationMessageFailed.sql
sql_files_greenai.sql: UPDATE ConversationMessages SET Status = @Failed WHERE Id = @Id AND Status = @Queued
sql_files_greenai.source: REDESIGNED — failure path, update by Id + optimistic guard

sql_files_greenai.name: UpdateConversationMessageStatusesByDlr.sql
sql_files_greenai.sql: UPDATE ConversationMessages SET Status = @Status WHERE SmsLogId IN @SmsLogIds
sql_files_greenai.source: ConversationRepository.cs:84 — same pattern, status values remapped to green-ai enum

invariants_preserved.description: ConversationMessage MUST exist with Status=Queued BEFORE gateway call. Guard read (GetConversationMessageById.sql) in DispatchConversationMessageHandler step 1. If not Queued: abort, do not call ISmsGatewayClient.
INSERT-FIRST (conversation_messaging domain) — row guaranteed to exist before any dispatch. DispatchConversationMessageHandler reads existing row, never inserts.
